# IMDN-lite — Image ID Splits
# DIV2K subset, seed=42
# Locked: 17 May 2025
# Team: Farida Gaber, Rodina Khalaf, Raneem Alnaghy

# BATCH 1 (first 100 images sampled)
BATCH1_ALL=7,26,28,31,33,45,47,72,74,81,82,90,95,96,100,104,105,115,128,143,
160,164,167,168,176,197,204,215,221,224,225,226,229,234,239,251,271,274,277,
282,285,297,301,345,349,353,364,368,371,374,380,388,389,390,430,433,460,465,
471,474,518,547,550,559,566,571,575,592,604,605,617,619,624,634,644,651,655,
656,664,666,678,687,693,700,715,719,722,723,734,754,755,759,760,766,780,785,
788,791,795,797

BATCH1_VAL=29,83,113,314,317,373,490,532,646,757
BATCH1_TRAIN=all BATCH1_ALL IDs excluding BATCH1_VAL (90 images)

# BATCH 2 (second 100 images sampled)
BATCH2_ALL=8,29,32,36,38,52,54,65,77,83,85,93,94,107,112,113,118,122,123,134,
148,165,185,189,192,193,202,230,238,250,253,254,257,260,261,262,265,270,272,
278,292,314,317,318,320,325,328,340,344,372,373,384,399,403,407,418,422,425,
428,436,444,445,446,463,469,490,493,521,526,531,532,535,579,585,618,622,632,
640,646,650,659,672,685,686,701,703,708,720,732,744,750,757,758,765,778,783,
784,789,790,794

BATCH2_VAL=29,83,113,314,317,373,490,532,646,757
BATCH2_TRAIN=all BATCH2_ALL IDs excluding BATCH2_VAL (90 images)

# COMBINED FINAL SPLIT 
TOTAL_TRAIN_IMAGES=180
TOTAL_VAL_IMAGES=20
VAL_IDS=29,83,113,314,317,373,490,532,646,757

# HELD-OUT TEST SET 
# Locked 17 May 2025 before all Week 3 experiments.
# These 5 images are permanently withheld from all hyperparameter
# decisions and checkpoint selection until final report only.
TEST_IDS=29,83,314,490,757
